sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: [{"pathway_id": "limited_stage_T1_2N0M0", "title": "Limited-Stage SCLC (Clinical Stage I–IIA: T1–2,N0,M0)", "branching_basis": ["Performance status", "Surgical eligibility", "Patient preference"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Clinical stage I–IIA (T1–2,N0,M0), good PS (0–2), after standard staging evaluation including CT, brain imaging, FDG-PET/CT, and lymph node staging.", "options": [{"type": "Surgical resection", "label": "Lobectomy with mediastinal lymph node dissection or systematic lymph node sampling", "preference": "Preferred for medically operable patients", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Systemic therapy", "label": "Adjuvant systemic therapy (4 cycles of platinum/etoposide) following surgery", "preference": "Required after resection", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["cisplatin_etoposide_limited"]}, {"type": "Radiation therapy", "label": "Postoperative mediastinal RT for N+ disease (concurrent or sequential with chemotherapy)", "preference": "Recommended for pathologic N2; may be considered for pathologic N1", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "SABR", "label": "Stereotactic ablative radiotherapy (SABR) to the primary tumor followed by adjuvant systemic therapy", "preference": "For medically inoperable patients or those who decline surgery", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["cisplatin_etoposide_limited"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant systemic therapy is recommended for all patients after complete resection (R0) or SABR. Postoperative mediastinal RT is recommended for N2 disease and may be considered for N1 disease [1]."}}, {"criteria": "Clinical stage I–IIA (T1–2,N0,M0), poor PS (3–4) due to SCLC.", "options": [{"type": "Systemic therapy", "label": "Systemic therapy ± RT (concurrent or sequential)", "preference": "May be considered", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["cisplatin_etoposide_limited"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Treatment intent may be palliative; systemic therapy may be given with or without RT depending on tolerance and response [1]."}}, {"criteria": "Clinical stage I–IIA (T1–2,N0,M0), poor PS (3–4) not due to SCLC.", "options": [{"type": "Supportive care", "label": "Individualized treatment including supportive care", "preference": "Appropriate", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Focus on palliative and supportive care [1]."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "limited_stage_IIB_IIIC", "title": "Limited-Stage SCLC (Clinical Stage IIB–IIIC: T3–4,N0,M0; T1–4,N1–3,M0)", "branching_basis": ["Performance status", "Response to therapy"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Good PS (0–2).", "options": [{"type": "Chemoradiation", "label": "Systemic therapy + concurrent RT (category 1)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["cisplatin_etoposide_limited", "carboplatin_etoposide_limited"]}, {"type": "Consolidation immunotherapy", "label": "Durvalumab for patients without progression after chemoradiation", "preference": "Preferred (category 1)", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["durvalumab_consolidation"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Durvalumab consolidation is administered after completion of chemoradiation for up to 24 months [1, 115]."}}, {"criteria": "Poor PS (3–4) due to SCLC.", "options": [{"type": "Systemic therapy ± RT", "label": "Systemic therapy ± RT (concurrent or sequential)", "preference": "May be considered", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["cisplatin_etoposide_limited"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Treatment is individualized based on tolerance and response [1]."}}, {"criteria": "Poor PS (3–4) not due to SCLC.", "options": [{"type": "Supportive care", "label": "Individualized treatment including supportive care", "preference": "Appropriate", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Focus on palliative and supportive care [1]."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "extensive_stage_no_symptoms_brain_mets", "title": "Extensive-Stage SCLC Without Localized Symptomatic Sites or Brain Metastases", "branching_basis": ["Performance status", "Response to therapy"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Good PS (0–2).", "options": [{"type": "Systemic therapy", "label": "Platinum/etoposide + immune checkpoint inhibitor (atezolizumab or durvalumab) (category 1)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["carboplatin_etoposide_atezolizumab", "carboplatin_etoposide_durvalumab"]}, {"type": "Maintenance immunotherapy", "label": "Continue atezolizumab or durvalumab until progression or intolerable toxicity", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["atezolizumab_maintenance", "durvalumab_maintenance"]}], "adju
